name: NSX Limited
description: NSX Limited is an Australia-based company that owns and operates the National Stock Exchange of Australia (NSXA), a regulated stock exchange providing a platform for listing and trading securities. The company facilitates capital raising for small to medium-sized enterprises and provides a transparent, efficient, and cost-effective market environment. Through its electronic trading system, NSX supports a diverse range of listed securities, including equities, debt, and managed funds. By offering specialized listing services and market infrastructure, NSX Limited plays a vital role in supporting the growth and liquidity of the Australian financial markets.
